About Our Hospital

Quality Healthcare,
Close to Home

Begusarai Multispeciality Hospital Pvt. Ltd. is a leading private healthcare institution located in Mahmadpur, Ward No. 38, Begusarai, Bihar — delivering advanced, compassionate, and affordable medical care to the people of Begusarai and surrounding districts.

Our hospital is equipped with state-of-the-art ICU, NICU, a fully modular Operation Theatre, a 24/7 Emergency Room, and an in-house Pathology laboratory — ensuring comprehensive care entirely under one roof.

Patient Care
Our Facilities

Everything You Need
Under One Roof

From emergency care to diagnostics — fully equipped with modern infrastructure and experienced medical staff.

🚨
Emergency Room

Round-the-clock emergency care for trauma, cardiac events, and all critical conditions.

24/7 Active
🫀
ICU

Advanced ICU with multi-parameter monitors, ventilators, and 24/7 specialist supervision.

Critical Care
🍼
NICU

Neonatal Intensive Care for premature and high-risk newborns with incubators and phototherapy.

Neonatology
🔪
Operation Theatre

Fully equipped modular OT with laminar air flow for safe surgical procedures of all types.

Modular OT
🩺
OPD

Outpatient consultations across multiple specialties — walk-in and appointment-based.

Multi-specialty
🔬
Pathology Lab

In-house diagnostic laboratory for blood tests, cultures, and emergency reports with fast turnaround.

In-house
💊
Pharmacy

24-hour in-hospital pharmacy with all prescription medicines. Inpatient discounts available.

24/7 Open
🛏️
Premium Wards

Deluxe, Special, and General ward options — clean, comfortable, and well-maintained.

Deluxe Available
Emergency Services

We Are Ready When
Every Second Counts

Our 24/7 emergency team handles all critical conditions with speed and precision. Ventilator-equipped ambulance on call.

🫀
Cardiac Emergencies

Heart attack, chest pain, arrhythmia — immediate cardiac monitoring and intervention.

🚗
Road Accident Trauma

Fractures, head injuries, internal bleeding — full trauma care with emergency surgery.

🐍
Snake / Dog Bite

Anti-venom, wound management, and anti-rabies protocol administered immediately.

🔥
Burns Treatment

Emergency care for chemical, thermal and electrical burns with wound care and ICU support.

😮‍💨
Critical / ICU Cases

Critically ill patients managed in advanced ICU with ventilator support around the clock.

🚑
Ventilator Ambulance — Available 24 Hours
Equipped with ventilator · Oxygen · Defibrillator · Serving Begusarai and surrounding districts
